name: 🍰 Simple Vanilla Cake
original:
Ingredients
1½ cups all-purpose flour
1 cup sugar
½ cup butter (softened)
2 eggs
1 cup milk
1½ tsp baking powder
1 tsp vanilla extract
A pinch of salt
scaled:
Ingredients
4 1/2 cups all-purpose flour
3 cup sugar
1 1/2 cup butter (softened)
6 eggs
3 cup milk
4 1/2 tsp baking powder
3 tsp vanilla extract
A pinch of salt
tip: Use a larger pan or bowl when scaling up to keep cooking even and avoid spills.

name: Chicken Shawarma Recipe
original:
For chicken marinade:
500 g boneless chicken (thigh or breast)
3 tbsp yogurt
2 tbsp olive oil
1 tbsp lemon juice
3 cloves garlic (minced)
1 tsp salt
1 tsp black pepper
1 tsp paprika
1 tsp cumin powder
½ tsp turmeric
½ tsp chili powder
½ tsp coriander powder
For shawarma wrap:
Pita bread or tortilla wraps
Sliced onions
Sliced tomatoes
Lettuce or cabbage
Garlic sauce:
4 tbsp mayonnaise
2 tbsp yogurt
1 tsp garlic paste
1 tsp lemon juice
Salt to taste
scaled:
For chicken marinade:
1166 11/16 g boneless chicken (thigh or breast)
7 tbsp yogurt
4 11/16 tbsp olive oil
2 5/16 tbsp lemon juice
7 cloves garlic (minced)
2 5/16 tsp salt
2 5/16 tsp black pepper
2 5/16 tsp paprika
2 5/16 tsp cumin powder
1 3/16 tsp turmeric
1 3/16 tsp chili powder
1 3/16 tsp coriander powder
For shawarma wrap:
Pita bread or tortilla wraps
Sliced onions
Sliced tomatoes
Lettuce or cabbage
Garlic sauce:
9 5/16 tbsp mayonnaise
4 11/16 tbsp yogurt
2 5/16 tsp garlic paste
2 5/16 tsp lemon juice
Salt to taste
tip: Use a larger pan or bowl when scaling up to keep cooking even and avoid spills.

name: Chicken Broast Recipe
original:
For chicken:
6 chicken pieces (leg or thigh pieces work best)
1 cup yogurt
1 tbsp lemon juice
1 tsp garlic paste
1 tsp ginger paste
1 tsp salt
1 tsp red chili powder
½ tsp black pepper
½ tsp turmeric
1 tsp paprika (optional)
For coating:
1 cup all-purpose flour (maida)
½ cup corn flour
1 tsp baking powder
1 tsp salt
1 tsp chili flakes (optional)
For frying:
Oil (for deep frying)
scaled:
For chicken:
6 chicken pieces (leg or thigh pieces work best)
1 cup yogurt
1 tbsp lemon juice
1 tsp garlic paste
1 tsp ginger paste
1 tsp salt
1 tsp red chili powder
½ tsp black pepper
½ tsp turmeric
1 tsp paprika (optional)
For coating:
1 cup all-purpose flour (maida)
½ cup corn flour
1 tsp baking powder
1 tsp salt
1 tsp chili flakes (optional)
For frying:
Oil (for deep frying)
tip: Always taste before serving and adjust seasoning.

name: Beef Burger Recipe
original:
For patties:

250 g minced beef (ground beef)
1 small onion (finely chopped)
1–2 garlic cloves (minced)
1 tsp salt
½ tsp black pepper
1 tsp soy sauce (optional, adds flavor)
1 tbsp bread crumbs (helps bind)
1 egg (optional, for binding)

For assembling:

2 burger buns
Lettuce leaves
2 cheese slices
Tomato slices
Onion rings
Ketchup / mayo / burger sauce
scaled:
For patties:

750 g minced beef (ground beef)
1 small onion (finely chopped)
1–2 garlic cloves (minced)
3 tsp salt
1 1/2 tsp black pepper
3 tsp soy sauce (optional, adds flavor)
3 tbsp bread crumbs (helps bind)
3 egg (optional, for binding)

For assembling:

2 burger buns
Lettuce leaves
2 cheese slices
Tomato slices
Onion rings
Ketchup / mayo / burger sauce
tip: Use a larger pan or bowl when scaling up to keep cooking even and avoid spills.

name: White Sauce Past
original:
🧂 Ingredients

For pasta

300 g pasta (penne or spaghetti)
Water (for boiling)
1 tsp salt

For white sauce (béchamel)

2 tbsp butter
2 tbsp all-purpose flour (maida)
2 cups milk (500 ml)
1 tsp salt (adjust to taste)
½ tsp black pepper
½ tsp chili flakes (optional)
½ tsp oregano

Vegetables (optional but recommended)

1 small onion, sliced
1 capsicum, chopped
½ cup sweet corn
½ cup mushrooms (optional)

Extras

½ cup grated cheese (optional)
scaled:
🧂 Ingredients

For pasta

600 g pasta (penne or spaghetti)
Water (for boiling)
2 tsp salt

For white sauce (béchamel)

4 tbsp butter
4 tbsp all-purpose flour (maida)
4 cups milk (1000 ml)
2 tsp salt (adjust to taste)
1 tsp black pepper
1 tsp chili flakes (optional)
1 tsp oregano

Vegetables (optional but recommended)

1 small onion, sliced
1 capsicum, chopped
1 cup sweet corn
1 cup mushrooms (optional)

Extras

1 cup grated cheese (optional)
tip: Use a larger pan or bowl when scaling up to keep cooking even and avoid spills.

name: 🍪 Chocolate Chip Cookies Recipe
original:
🧂 Ingredients
125 g butter (softened)
100 g brown sugar
50 g white sugar
1 egg
1 tsp vanilla extract
180 g all-purpose flour
½ tsp baking soda
¼ tsp salt
120 g chocolate chips
scaled:
🧂 Ingredients
250 g butter (softened)
200 g brown sugar
100 g white sugar
2 egg
2 tsp vanilla extract
360 g all-purpose flour
1 tsp baking soda
1/2 tsp salt
240 g chocolate chips
tip: Use a larger pan or bowl when scaling up to keep cooking even and avoid spills.

name: 🍫 Chocolate Ice Cream Recipe (Serves 3)
original:
🧂 Ingredients
1 cup (heavy cream
½ cup (whole milk
⅓ cup  sugar
¼ cup  cocoa powder
1 tsp vanilla extract
A pinch of salt
50 g dark chocolate (optional, for richer taste)
scaled:
🧂 Ingredients
2 cup (heavy cream
1 cup (whole milk
11/16 cup  sugar
1/2 cup  cocoa powder
2 tsp vanilla extract
A pinch of salt
100 g dark chocolate (optional, for richer taste)

details.scaled: 100 g dark chocolate (optional, for richer taste)

name: Butter Chicken Recipe
original:
🧂 Ingredients
For the Chicken Marinade
500g boneless chicken, cut into pieces
½ cup yogurt
1 tbsp lemon juice
1 tsp red chili powder
½ tsp turmeric powder
1 tsp garam masala
1 tsp ginger-garlic paste
Salt to taste
scaled:
🧂 Ingredients
For the Chicken Marinade
1000 g boneless chicken, cut into pieces
1 cup yogurt
2 tbsp lemon juice
2 tsp red chili powder
1 tsp turmeric powder
2 tsp garam masala
2 tsp ginger-garlic paste
Salt to taste
tip: Use a larger pan or bowl when scaling up to keep cooking even and avoid spills.

name: Simple Spaghetti Recip
original:
Ingredients
400 g spaghetti
2 tbsp olive oil
4 cloves garlic, minced
1 medium onion, finely chopped
400 g canned tomatoes (or 4 fresh tomatoes, chopped)
1 tsp salt
½ tsp black pepper
1 tsp dried oregano
½ tsp chili flakes (optional)
¼ cup fresh basil or parsley, chopped
½ cup grated Parmesan cheese (optional)
scaled:
Ingredients
800 g spaghetti
4 tbsp olive oil
8 cloves garlic, minced
1 medium onion, finely chopped
800 g canned tomatoes (or 4 fresh tomatoes, chopped)
2 tsp salt
1 tsp black pepper
2 tsp dried oregano
1 tsp chili flakes (optional)
1/2 cup fresh basil or parsley, chopped
1 cup grated Parmesan cheese (optional)

details.original: 400 g canned tomatoes (or 4 fresh tomatoes, chopped)
details.scaled: 800 g canned tomatoes (or 4 fresh tomatoes, chopped)

details.original: ¼ cup fresh basil or parsley, chopped
details.scaled: 1/2 cup fresh basil or parsley, chopped

tip: Use a larger pan or bowl when scaling up to keep cooking even and avoid spills.
